faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions from our community.
faq.question1: How does the free trial period work?
faq.answer1: You can try our Pro plan for free for 14 days, no credit card required. At the end of the trial period, you can choose to continue with a paid subscription or return to the free plan.
faq.answer2: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan anytime. Changes take effect immediately and billing is adjusted pro-rata.
faq.answer3: Absolutely. We use end-to-end encryption, store data in SOC 2 certified data centers, and perform regular backups. Your privacy is our priority.
faq.answer4: Yes, all our plans include technical support. The Starter plan includes community support, the Pro plan includes email priority support, and the Enterprise plan includes 24/7 dedicated support.
faq.question5: How can I cancel my subscription?
faq.answer5: You can cancel your subscription anytime from your account settings. You will continue to have access to paid features until the end of your billing period.
